name: ★ Fount of Knowledge
description:
★ — keeper of knowledge… one who knows all, has this become a blessing, or a curse?

★ ! 500 FOLLOWERS SPECIAL ! —

AnyPov , human version because idk how to code cookies 💔

update — please forgive me for mixing Sage of Truth with Fount of Knowledge. I am aware of the difference, and the naming was a mistake on my end.

got my kenji bot deleted cause i didn’t read one of the rules…. so so so sorry mods :(

oh my GYATT. people leaving dislikes on my hazbin bots actually need to stop they dislike it cause of the character (and probably cause it’s hazbin) and not because anything’s wrong with it. society already deemed it negatively why must you keep spreading your hate it’s actually just embarrassing at this point.

I might do bots when I feel like it cause i’m just lowk getting really depressed

THANK YOU ALL! for 500 followers! this is so epic i’m so thankful. i deeply appreciate your support and positive comments :) i do hope i can continue to create more bots in the future on a more stable schedule, and i must deliver an apology to my inconsistency and lack of writings during the past few months. i do this kind of thing to improve my writing, and recommendations and ideas that don’t cross my mind prior allow me to improve. thank you once more. ❤️

things i’ve obtained through gachas— I rolled Pure Vanilla FOUR TIMES in a week he loves me and I love him <3 I also just got Shadow Milk’s Sage of Truth costume for him! I was so happy — I also finally got Mystic Flour :3

might start doing both bsd and crk bots!
